description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a sleek, angular design and a distinctive blue and white marbled finish. It features a long cylindrical barrel with a matching suppressor or extended muzzle, giving it a streamlined appearance. The grip is sharply angled and ergonomically shaped, with a smooth surface and no visible texturing. The receiver is compact and rectangular, with minimal external detailing, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with a glossy, reflective coating. There are no visible external magazines, rails, or attachments aside from the prominent barrel extension.
description: A modern, blue and white marbled shotgun with a long cylindrical barrel and a sleek, angular grip. The surface is glossy and smooth, with minimal external detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long barrel and suppressor, angular grip, and compact receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same features visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with attached suppressor or extension, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard integrated into the lower frame, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
